THE TORNADO INITIALLY TOUCHED DOWN NEAR THE INTERSECTION OF ALTERNATE HIGHWAY 64 AND JENKINS RD AND CONTINUED NORTHWEST FOR ABOUT 2 MILES. A CHAPEL, AN ABANDONED DWELLING AND 2 ABANDONED SINGLE-WIDE MOBILE HOMES HAD SIGNIFICANT TO MAJOR DAMAGE AND ANOTHER ABANDONED DWELLING AND A SHED WERE DESTROYED NEAR HIGHWAY 64 AND JENKINS RD. SEVERAL OUTBUILDINGS AND A GREENHOUSE WERE SEVERELY DAMAGED TO DESTROYED NEAR A FARM AND RESIDENCE ON CLAUDE GREEN RD.
